summary: Iteration 8 both-side testing complete. Backend: 25/25 pytest pass (12 regression + 6 iter7 fill-shortages + 7 new iter8 suggest-lines). GET /api/schedule/2026-07-16/suggest-lines?shift=day returns free_pool_size=38 with fully_covered=100% for X-Smart XL, E4, X-Protint, GX300 (as spec'd). Active lines (X-Smart/E2/Spares) properly excluded. Sort verified: (-coverage_pct,-fillable,line). Cell-level breakdown validates no person reuse across cells within a single line's computation. 404 on missing schedule. Add-line flow (POST /api/schedule with appended {priority=max+1,run_count=1}) works end-to-end. Frontend: Board /board?date=2026-07-16&shift=day shows suggest-lines-btn under Unassigned row. Clicking opens suggestions-dialog with title 'LINES YOU COULD ALSO RUN', '38 free people available', green fully-covered rows for X-Smart XL/E4/X-Protint/GX300 each with an active suggestion-add-<line> Add button. Clicking Add-X-Smart XL closed dialog, showed success toast 'Added X-Smart XL to today's schedule', board reloaded with new X-Smart XL column (14 slots) and Unassigned pool shrank 38→24. Baseline restored at end (req=40 short=2).
critical_code_review_comments: suggest_lines endpoint correctly filters details_by_line to non-active lines only (active_lines set of line_configs).
line_used set per suggestion prevents cross-cell person reuse within one line's calculation — matches spec.
Specialist-first sort (person_total_skills asc, name) reused for consistency with fill-shortages.
coverage_pct rounded to int; sort tuple (-coverage_pct,-fillable,line) — deterministic and correct.
free_pool derivation = persons - absent - used (across all current cell assignments) — matches UI's unassignedPersons derivation.
Frontend addLineToSchedule preserves existing overrides + unassigned_keys when appending new line at maxPrio+1, rc=1 (per spec).
Add button disabled state tied to fillable===0 — verified in SuggestionRow component.
Minor observation: SuggestionRow adds progress bar and 'gap' preview for partially-covered suggestions, nice UX touch.
No regressions: /persons alpha sort, /schedule generation, /adjust, /fill-shortages, /export, /analytics, /stats all still green.
seed_data_creation: None; used existing baseline date=2026-07-16 shift=day (X-Smart p1 rc2, E2 p2 rc1, Spares p3 rc1). Baseline restored via TestZZZRestoreBaseline at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py now has 25 tests (12 base + 6 iter7 + 7 iter8). Run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -o addopts= -v`. Standard baseline: date=2026-07-16 shift=day → req=40 ass=38 short=2 free_pool=38. Fully-covered suggestions on baseline: X-Smart XL(14), E4(13), X-Protint(13), GX300(5). The add-line flow appends at priority=max+1, run_count=1, and preserves overrides/unassigned_keys. TestZZZRestoreBaseline auto-restores baseline at the end.
